parameters.title: ={{'[P1 SECURITY] Session TTL Failure — User: ' + $json.userId}}
parameters.body:
=## 🔴 P1 Security Incident: Session TTL Failure

**User ID:** {{$json.userId}}
**Session Age:** {{$json.sessionAge}}s (limit: {{$json.ttlLimit}}s)
**Exceeded By:** {{$json.exceededBy}}s
**Data Exposed:** {{$json.dataExposed}}
**Detected At:** {{$json.timestamp}}

**Action Required:**
- [ ] Force logout all active sessions
- [ ] Audit session storage for data retention violations
- [ ] Verify zero-retention cleanup on client-side
- [ ] Security incident report per GDPR Art. 33
- [ ] Compliance Officer review

parameters.subject: ={{'🔴 P1: CBAMValid Session TTL Failure — Data Retention Violation'}}
parameters.text:
=🔴 SESSION TTL FAILURE — ZERO-RETENTION VIOLATION

User: {{$json.userId}}
Session Age: {{$json.sessionAge}}s (exceeded {{$json.ttlLimit}}s limit by {{$json.exceededBy}}s)

ACTION: Force logout all. Security incident report filed.
GDPR Art. 33 notification may be required.
